personas: Primary User: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient task completion and quick access to features.
Secondary User: Casual user looking for intuitive navigation and minimal learning curve.
key_flows: User onboarding and account setup — smooth sign-up, initial walkthrough, profile customization.
Core task flow — accessing main features, completing primary tasks with minimal steps.
Support and help — locating FAQs, contacting support, troubleshooting common issues.
friction_points: Complex or hidden navigation elements causing confusion.
Long form inputs or unclear validation feedback during onboarding.
Slow loading times impacting task completion and user satisfaction.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Content is structured with a clear priority on primary user tasks at the top level, supported by secondary informational content and help resources accessible via footer and support sections.
navigation: Top navigation bar with primary features (Dashboard, Tasks, Profile).
Side navigation for secondary options and settings.
Footer navigation containing Help, About, and Legal links.

components: Header with logo and primary nav
Main content area for primary interactions

responsive.mobile: Single column layout with a hamburger menu for navigation, collapsible sections to minimize scrolling.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with collapsible sidebar, main content adjusts to wider screen.
responsive.desktop: Fixed two-column layout with persistent sidebar and full header navigation visible.

design_system.typography: Primary font: Open Sans, weights 400 (regular), 600 (semi-bold), 700 (bold). Base font size 16px, line height 1.5 for readability.
design_system.colors: Primary color: #0052cc (blue), Secondary: #172b4d (dark blue), Accent: #ff5630 (red). Background: #ffffff, Text primary: #172b4d, Text secondary: #6b778c.
design_system.spacing: 8px base grid system with increments at 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48px for padding and margins.
components: Buttons with primary, secondary, disabled states
Form inputs with focus, error states
Cards with shadow and rounded corners

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard using tab, enter, and arrow keys where applicable. Focus states are clearly visible.
accessibility.screen_reader: ARIA roles and labels are applied on all controls. Semantic HTML is used for landmarks and headings to support screen reader navigation.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text.

interactions.animations: Subtle fade and slide transitions for modals and dropdowns with duration of 200ms to 300ms, easing ease-in-out to maintain smoothness without distraction.
interactions.loading_state: Loading spinners or skeleton screens used to indicate content is being fetched, with accessible text description for screen readers.
interactions.empty_state: Clear messaging with iconography explaining absence of content and call-to-action buttons to guide users on next steps.
